entry.title: Every PyTorch Shape Error Explained (With Fixes) — HeyTensor
entry.summary: The 10 most common PyTorch tensor shape RuntimeErrors explained with root causes and code fixes. Stop guessing and fix your shape mismatches.

entry.title: Tensor Shape Cheat Sheet: Every Layer's Input/Output Formula — HeyTensor
entry.summary: Quick-reference formulas for every PyTorch layer's output shape. Worked examples with real numbers for Conv2d, Linear, LSTM, MaxPool2d, MultiheadAttention, and more.
